overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dense forest that transitions from dark woodland interior to sunlit paths with wildflowers, ending in an open mountain meadow at dusk. The character moves steadily along dirt trails with two swords visible on his back as the lighting shifts from shadowed forest to golden hour and finally to twilight.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest interior with rocky undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense forest undergrowth, navigating between trees and rocks

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming a thick canopy overhead
moss-covered boulder partially hidden by ferns
standing dead tree with no leaves among the green pines

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a densely packed pine forest with limited sky visibility. The environment is shadowed and enclosed, with large mossy rocks and a dead tree trunk visible among the living trees. The ground is covered in dirt and undergrowth.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit forest trail with scattered rocks

events.description: emerges from dark forest interior into bright sunlight with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking along a sun-dappled forest path with swords visible on back

entered.detail: blue sky with scattered white clouds visible through tree canopy
small stones and rocks lining the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The scene brightens dramatically as the character emerges from the dense woods into a sunlit forest trail. The sky becomes visible with scattered clouds, and the path is clearer with scattered rocks along the edges. The lighting shifts from shadowed to direct sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail bordered by yellow wildflowers

events.description: yellow wildflowers appear along the right side of the path
distant snow-capped mountains become visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding path toward the distant mountains, passing yellow flowers

entered.detail: dense cluster of yellow flowers lining the right side of the trail
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the distance between trees

segments.scene_description: The path continues through a more open forest area with vibrant yellow wildflowers lining the right side. Snow-capped mountains become visible in the distance ahead, creating a scenic vista. The trail remains dirt-based with scattered pine trees on either side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain meadow at dusk with panoramic views

events.description: exits forest trail into open grassland with unobstructed mountain views
ambient light fades significantly as dusk settles and sky turns purple-pink

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward the distant mountains as twilight approaches

entered.detail: expansive meadow with tall grass replacing the forest path
purple and pink twilight sky with fading light

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest into a wide-open grassland with unobstructed views of the snow-capped mountains ahead. The lighting shifts to dusk with a purple-pink sky as the sun sets. The ground changes from dirt trail to tall grass, and the mountains appear closer and more prominent against the twilight sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, shadowed pine forest that gradually opens into a vast mountain meadow at twilight. It begins within an enclosed woodland of mossy rocks and dead trunks where the canopy obscures the sky, moving steadily along a dirt path through the undergrowth. As the character emerges from the thicket, the scene brightens dramatically into direct sunlight, revealing a clearer trail under a sky of scattered clouds. The environment then shifts into a more open forest area where vibrant yellow wildflowers line the path and snow-capped mountains first appear on the distant horizon. Finally, the camera breaks free from the trees into a wide grassland of tall grass, as the lighting transforms into the purple and pink hues of a sunset against the now prominent mountain peaks.
